'''ngogachaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:niched|niched]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:niched|niched]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngogachaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogachithi|ngogachithi]] || [[word:ngogachiji|ngogachiji]] || [[word:ngogachishi|ngogachishi]] || [[word:ngogachiki|ngogachiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogachuthuthu|ngogachuthuthu]] || [[word:ngogachujuju|ngogachujuju]] || [[word:ngogachushushu|ngogachushushu]] || [[word:ngogachukuku|ngogachukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogachuthu|ngogachuthu]] || [[word:ngogachuju|ngogachuju]] || [[word:ngogachushu|ngogachushu]] || [[word:ngogachuku|ngogachuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogachufthuf|ngogachufthuf]] || [[word:ngogachufjuf|ngogachufjuf]] || [[word:ngogachufshuf|ngogachufshuf]] || [[word:ngogachufkuf|ngogachufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogachethe|ngogachethe]] || [[word:ngogacheje|ngogacheje]] || [[word:ngogacheshe|ngogacheshe]] || [[word:ngogacheke|ngogacheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogachothotho|ngogachothotho]] || [[word:ngogachojojo|ngogachojojo]] || [[word:ngogachoshosho|ngogachoshosho]] || [[word:ngogachokoko|ngogachokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogachotho|ngogachotho]] || [[word:ngogachojo|ngogachojo]] || [[word:ngogachosho|ngogachosho]] || [[word:ngogachoko|ngogachoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogachofthof|ngogachofthof]] || [[word:ngogachofjof|ngogachofjof]] || [[word:ngogachofshof|ngogachofshof]] || [[word:ngogachofkof|ngogachofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogachĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogachĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogachĂŠthĂŠ|ngogachĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogachĂŠjĂŠ|ngogachĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogachĂŠshĂŠ|ngogachĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogachĂŠkĂŠ|ngogachĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogachathatha|ngogachathatha]] || [[word:ngogachajaja|ngogachajaja]] || [[word:ngogachashasha|ngogachashasha]] || [[word:ngogachakaka|ngogachakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogachatha|ngogachatha]] || [[word:ngogachaja|ngogachaja]] || [[word:ngogachasha|ngogachasha]] || [[word:ngogachaka|ngogachaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogachafthaf|ngogachafthaf]] || [[word:ngogachafjaf|ngogachafjaf]] || [[word:ngogachafshaf|ngogachafshaf]] || [[word:ngogachafkaf|ngogachafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngogachasha|ngogachasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogachshĂ«sha|ngogachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogachrosha|ngogachrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogachmusha|ngogachmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogachyasha|ngogachyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogachnkshĂ«sha|gongogachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogachnkrosha|gongogachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogachnkmusha|gongogachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogachnkyasha|gongogachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngogagachasha|ngogagachasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogagachshĂ«sha|ngogagachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogagachrosha|ngogagachrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogagachmusha|ngogagachmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogagachyasha|ngogagachyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogagachnkshĂ«sha|gongogagachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogagachnkrosha|gongogagachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogagachnkmusha|gongogagachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogagachnkyasha|gongogagachnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngegĂŠchasha|ngegĂŠchasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngegĂŠchshĂ«sha|ngegĂŠchshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngegĂŠchrosha|ngegĂŠchrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngegĂŠchmusha|ngegĂŠchmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngegĂŠchyasha|ngegĂŠchyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongegĂŠchnkshĂ«sha|gongegĂŠchnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongegĂŠchnkrosha|gongegĂŠchnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongegĂŠchnkmusha|gongegĂŠchnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongegĂŠchnkyasha|gongegĂŠchnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngogfachasha|ngogfachasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogfachshĂ«sha|ngogfachshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogfachrosha|ngogfachrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogfachmusha|ngogfachmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogfachyasha|ngogfachyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogfachnkshĂ«sha|gongogfachnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogfachnkrosha|gongogfachnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogfachnkmusha|gongogfachnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogfachnkyasha|gongogfachnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
